title: FADG
description: A mod packed with bizarre and eerie creatures—Tomie, Chu Renmei, Saya, and more.
body:
**Feature**
1. Strange and lovely creatures
1. Something strange and possessing special abilities
   
You’re free to drop this into any modpack—no need to ask or get permission—and recording videos is more than welcome.

可以自由随意的加入到整合包中，无须询问或申请，录制视频也非常的欢迎。

![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jH81p1UZ/images/fff3438b72e436a1e4525bee8288bf1872e3c025.png)

![saya and tomie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb8bca471426f98150dd56c21e36d823823be572.png)
**Backstory**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

来自域外的邪魔，邪恶之月

感受到了虫族女皇踏上了一块新的大陆

祂的目光降临了，祂降下了祂的眷族

把这片大陆，当成了自己的又一片掌控之地

An evil creature form another dimension--the Evil Moon.

The Evil Moon felt that the Inscet Queen had stepped onto a new world

Its gaze descended upon him, and he sent down his spawn of Evil Moon

Regard this world as another place of control for oneself.

</details>

模组自带模组内说明书

The mod includes its own manual.

![fadgbook](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fc88790aafb38dff8508ae859639c63ea1fb3ba.png)


**中文介绍（Chinese version intro）**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

boss鸡夜

玩家需要使用神圣之眼右键激活的末地传送中心，打开传送门

如果要还原传送门，只要拿祂目（击杀boss后获得）右键鸡夜维度的传送门中心即可

![new boss portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3e504a2c7b015dd52c1b28ebf1899d18a2fddd9.png)

![Boss:Chicken Night](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b82f9579201035d543557a39a92b1b53b539f741_0.webp)

鸡夜和其使徒拥有限伤机制，最大伤害不超过20点。

每过60秒会有60%的概率对范围内的所有生物施加净化雷电。

净化雷电没有伤害，但会清除所有范围内生物的效果buff，并对使徒附加20秒的抗性提升3和力量3，对其它生物附加20秒的虚弱3，反胃3，饥饿3，挖掘疲劳3，缓慢3。

对非玩家生物额外造成20点真实伤害和20点鸡夜自身的伤害。

鸡夜和其使徒拥有常驻的生命恢复buff。

右键一罪与百善可以消除使徒的生命恢复。

击杀卖主的使徒，可以消除鸡夜的生命恢复buff。

在没有右键一罪与百善的情况下，卖主的使徒不会受到伤害。

Boss掉落物

![boss drop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e09b010d9ee4c92bc1cc309cf045b7df8a87bdfa.png)

![boss drop 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35bcb7922aecf23b59aaaf4b224724990c717f6c.png)

禁果

破坏橡树树叶有0.1%的概率掉落

击杀鸡夜后，在鸡夜维度吃下，能够复活鸡夜

![Forbidden Fruit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e349358c858410773a4a9f202598803000ede507.png)

##
僵尸

现在击杀僵尸（原版的）会有1%的概率掉落僵尸头

5种皮肤

制作红木棺椁，塞入僵尸头，腐肉10个，人肉10个，等待片刻，即可召唤一只僵尸

召唤的僵尸右键即可驯服

制作控尸铃，右键僵尸，即可更改僵尸的跟随模式

僵尸只会主动攻击楚人美和鬼魂，剩下的情况下不会主动攻击，除非自身被攻击，或主人受伤或者主人攻击其它生物，僵尸才会攻击

且僵尸的攻击，可以无视鬼魂和楚人美的机制，强行对其造成伤害

![jiangshi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/204bb3e056a8dd3ebe71ca7d1516282f78db75d7.png)
## 
富江

只能被火焰彻底杀死

被火焰所燃烧的富江，将失去分裂自己的能力

如果没有火焰，受伤的富江会留血，血液会在一段时间内成长为半只富江

半只富江会在一段时间内成长为富江，富江之间会互相进行打斗

富江死亡后会掉落富江的肉

（玩家可以用割肉小刀，割下自己或其它玩家的肉，用肉来驯服富江）
![knife](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jH81p1UZ/images/8c36d1b77d31c7612be74232b0cb7f16068d83b5.png)
![tomie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jH81p1UZ/images/477f005cc7a3a976602745139965d2f8f060b03b.png)

## 
沙耶

附近50立方米没有玩家的情况下，沙耶会显现出本体

如果有玩家，则会以人类的形象示人

可以用人肉驯服

沙耶在血量低于最大生命50%的时候，会对对祂造成伤害的生物注射孢子（1.1.0版本后修改）

（1.1.0版本修改为：攻击沙耶不会被传染孢子，但是被沙耶攻击会，如果沙耶是被火焰以外的东西杀死，会向附近30格释放自己的孢子）

孢子在经过10分钟后，会同化该生物

把该生物变成新的沙耶，只有用火焰才能抑制沙耶散播孢子的能力
![saya](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jH81p1UZ/images/d4ec8cabe1965dd71554952b4ddd327bdb66e496.png)
## 
鬼魂

有5种不同的皮肤

在未被火焰燃烧的时候，鬼魂免疫一切伤害

只有当鬼魂被火焰燃烧，鬼魂才能正常受到伤害

当然，使用火矢或火焰附加的武器，可以直接对鬼魂造成伤害，而不需要提前点燃鬼魂
![ghost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jH81p1UZ/images/1979dd6598266ce622e85a11d1e92f3425dfb636.png)
## 
不可名状之神

不会自然生成，纯吉祥物

无敌，不会主动攻击任何生物

![unknow god](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jH81p1UZ/images/b4623f1b1e76eba69c4e528e0c720a1a97ebf454.png)
## 
雨中女郎

一幅只能从图书管理员那花费2组绿宝石买到的神秘画作

以画作为中心，10立方米的生物，会慢慢的受到画作的影响

开始产生负面影响，最终失去生命
![girl in the rain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jH81p1UZ/images/07dafd405cb946be8edcdb995a71b34395875ad7.png)
## 
更多内容请查看更新日志

</details>

**English version intro**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Boss Chicken Night

Players must right-click the activated End Portal center with the Holy Eye to open the dimensional gateway.  

To reset the portal, simply right-click the portal center in the Chicken Night dimension with the Theye (dropped by the boss).

![new boss portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3e504a2c7b015dd52c1b28ebf1899d18a2fddd9.png)
 
![Boss:Chicken Night](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b82f9579201035d543557a39a92b1b53b539f741_0.webp)

Chicken Night and its Apostles have a damage cap — maximum damage taken is 20 points.

Every 60 seconds, there's a 60% chance to cast Purification Lightning on all nearby entities.

Deals no damage, but clears all active effects.

Apostles gain Resistance III and Strength III for 20 seconds.

Other entities receive Weakness III, Nausea III, Hunger III, Mining Fatigue III, and Slowness III for 20 seconds.

Non-player entities take 20 true damage + 20 damage from Chicken Night.

Chicken Night and Apostles have permanent Regeneration.

Right-click "One Sin and Hundreds of Good Deeds" to remove Regeneration from Apostles.

Killing the Judas Apostle removes Regeneration from Chicken Night.

Judas Apostle is invulnerable until "One Sin and Hundreds of Good Deeds" is right-clicked.

Boss Drops:

![boss drop en](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c9d44b097e944efa68cc90ccb61117291067294.png)

![boss drop 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35bcb7922aecf23b59aaaf4b224724990c717f6c.png)


Forbidden Fruit

0.1% chance to drop when breaking Oak Leaves.

If eaten in the Chicken Night dimension after defeating Chicken Night, it will resurrect the boss.

![Forbidden Fruit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e349358c858410773a4a9f202598803000ede507.png)

## 
Jiangshi

Now, when you kill a zombie, there is a 1% chance it will drop a zombie head.

5 different skins.

To craft a Red Mangrove Coffin, insert a Zombie Head, 10 Rotten Flesh, and 10 Human Flesh, then wait to summon a Jiangshi.

Right-click the summoned Jiangshi to tame it.

Craft a Jiangshi Bell and right-click a Jiangshi to switch its following mode.

Jiangshi only attack Chu Renmei and Ghosts. They don't attack others unless attacked themselves, or if their owner is hurt or attacks other mobs. Jiangshi attacks can also bypass the immunity mechanics of Ghosts and Chu Renmei and deal damage directly.

![jiangshi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/204bb3e056a8dd3ebe71ca7d1516282f78db75d7.png)

## 
Kawakami Tomie

Can only be completely killed by fire.

Kawakami Tomie, burned by fire, will lose the ability to split himself.

If there were no fire, the injured Tomie would leave blood, which would grow into half Tomie over a period of time.

Half of Tomie will grow into Tomie within a period of time, and Tomie will fight against each other.
After Tomie's death, Tomie Meat will drop.

(Players can use a Meat cutting knife to cut off their own or other players' meat and use it to tame Tomie)
![knife](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jH81p1UZ/images/8c36d1b77d31c7612be74232b0cb7f16068d83b5.png)
![tomie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jH81p1UZ/images/477f005cc7a3a976602745139965d2f8f060b03b.png)
## 
Saya

When there are no players in the vicinity of 50m³, Saya will reveal her true form.

If there are players, they will appear in human form.

Saya can be tamed with human meat

When Saya's health drops below 50% of its maximum life, its will inject spores into creatures that cause damage to him.（Below 1.1.0 ver）

（In version 1.1.0, it has been changed to:Now attack Saya will not spread spores.But being attacked by Saya will.
If Saya died with out fire,will release its spores to 30x30x30 ）

Spores will assimilate the organism after 10 minutes.

To turn this creature into a new Saya, only fire can suppress Saya's ability to spread spores.
![saya](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jH81p1UZ/images/d4ec8cabe1965dd71554952b4ddd327bdb66e496.png)
## 
Ghost

There are 5 different types of skin.

When not burned by flames, ghosts are immune to all harm.

Only when ghosts are burned by flames can they be harmed normally.

Of course,Use weapons enchanted with Flame or Fire Aspect can directly cause damage to ghosts.
![ghost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jH81p1UZ/images/1979dd6598266ce622e85a11d1e92f3425dfb636.png)
## 
Unknow God

Will not spawn in the game, mascot.

Invincible, will not actively attack any creature.

![unknow god](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jH81p1UZ/images/b4623f1b1e76eba69c4e528e0c720a1a97ebf454.png)
## 
The Girl In The Rain

A mysterious painting that can only be purchased from a librarian for 128 of emeralds.

The creatures within 10m ³ of the painting will gradually be influenced by it.

Starting to have negative effects and ultimately losing one's life.
![girl in the rain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jH81p1UZ/images/07dafd405cb946be8edcdb995a71b34395875ad7.png)
## 
For more information, please check the ChangeLog.

</details>

如何修改模组的规则

How to modify the mod's rules


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![cn gamerule change](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b58af3d3b78ae3d6a6d4be0b4da44ed89157ed9e.png)![en gamerule change](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/574bd530b303f92fe7f290655598cae64cbeddf6.png)

</details>




Deleted thing

被移除的东西

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
邪恶之月（1.1.0版本后已经删除）

Evil Moon(Deleted in version 1.1.0)

不可战胜，只会在现实时间的00：00~05：00在主世界出现

Invincible, will only appear in the real world time from 00:00 to 05:00.（It will only appear in Overworld）

每过一段时间，邪恶之月会对全图生物进行雷击的攻击

Every once in a while, the Evil Moon will launch lightning strikes on all creatures in the world.

这个攻击可以伤害到创造模式下的玩家，但是攻击伤害很低。（不想祂出现，可以直接修改系统时间）

This attack can harm players in creation mode, but the attack damage is very low. (If you don't want him to appear, you can directly modify the system time)
![evilmoon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jH81p1UZ/images/7d73ca8b655d5973e53ac27b5c7d5f2118a9b7fc.png)

</details>
